title: Business Intelligence Analyst
description:
SpaceX is advancing aerospace technology to enable human space exploration and satellite internet. We've revolutionized space transport.

We're seeking a Business Intelligence Analyst to join our Aerospace team in Atlanta. This role offers the opportunity to contribute meaningfully to our mission while developing your professional skills in a collaborative environment.
responsibilities: Design and optimize data warehouse schemas for analytics and reporting
Develop complex SQL queries and stored procedures for business intelligence platforms
Build interactive dashboards and reports for executive and operational decision-making
Partner with stakeholders to understand business requirements and translate to technical specifications
Monitor data quality and implement automated validation frameworks
Support analytics platform upgrades and infrastructure optimization

requirements.education: Bachelor's degree in Computer Science, Data Science, or Business Analytics
requirements.experience_years: 2-4 years of business intelligence or analytics development experience
certifications: Tableau Desktop Specialist or equivalent BI platform certification
